steps.title: Spot the importance contrast
steps.content:
The passage establishes that delivery speed and tracking are rated high importance for customer experience while aesthetics are rated low importance.

Since customer experience drives customer retention (per prior studies), the importance ratings reveal which factors most influence whether customers make repeat purchases.

steps.title: Match importance to retention
steps.content:
Choice B directly translates the survey's importance contrast to customer retention: repeat purchases are more closely tied to delivery efficiency and transparency than to package design.

Choices A and D request new research or claim new customer benefits not supported by the findings, while C mistakenly shifts focus to reviews.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
